activeWork.progress: Completed items 1-5 of 14. Resolved cron daemon status on WSL2, confirmed skill-based LLM work model, dropped --local flag from capmon onboard. Design doc updated. Ready to continue with item 6.

recentDecisions: Dropped --local flag from capmon onboard; LLM remediation work must live in skill, not binary
Cron job setup deferred until CI workflow (capmon-check.yml) exists
Verified WSL2 cron daemon running and systemd-enabled for auto-start
nextSteps: Item 6: Define .capmon-cache/<slug>/meta.json schema (fields: provider, content_type, source_uri, content_hash, fetched_at — exact schema undefined)
Item 7: Clarify notes field in source manifests — machine-parsed trigger values or human-readable annotation?
Item 8: Define downstream effect of generation_method field (purely informational or pipeline behaves differently?)
Item 9: Structural diff in CI for source code — proper AST diff or text diff acceptable for v1?
Item 10: Two .md URL patterns — what if both return 200? Take first, take longer, or merge?
Item 11: Provider removal — what happens to cache, open issues, format doc orphans?
Item 12: Loop failure / partial state — recovery procedure if syllago-capmon-process fails mid-run?
Item 13: Migration period — does capmon check handle both *.md and *.yaml format docs?
Item 14: Diff preview size cap — GitHub issue body ~65536 char limit; large diffs could exceed

context.notes: Design doc significantly more complete. syllago-capmon-process skill created as side effect. Cron architecture documented and ready for CI integration phase.
